access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: The long-acting phosphodiesterase inhibitor tadalafil does not influence athletes' VO2max, aerobic, and anaerobic thresholds in normoxia.
summary: Double-blind crossover study in 14 healthy male athletes testing single-dose tadalafil 20 mg versus placebo during maximal cycle exercise in normoxia, with VO2max, ventilatory and anaerobic thresholds, blood pressure, heart rate, oxygen pulse, lactate, and perceived exertion outcomes.
